MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Thu, 18 Apr 2024 07:51:07 -0700
Subject: Prosecutors seek to ask Trump about civil fraud, E. Jean Carroll cases and more if he testifies in…
Message-ID: <66213363.170a0220.d82f7.5d54SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAC44KOWBCGELQCAL435OFCFFZDIDAABD67SOLRL7GD72M26TXSX6SKOE3WGDCTIDUDSFLMIJC6DSB7PJF4KJMFARFWGZ2BGVRHQFVVJCKIESZMIZJCN2L5O4D3QABMZZR4VBAWIE2YL23VS2K7T5AY2TZIEIIYTNV572K4DRLUMJTTEY5DSR4&d=AIAADVLI6SD2YO75PO2E6H2QL32ASUG3PASVIKVSQQMLRZDSIW6I3SYOVYGXCDNWMZME6OIDF5E6XGMFJM2YOWTS4WE2YD245RS3XWJ4W24VQNQYYJLI36LEP7KFOGVGT55LB4KESLKTWZYVVY7OQE5YAN7YYJO7JPYCGLI5XLBKLDYVYEGM4Q7F4GPJERWUKVWTSAFKXD246S6QXM&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACGV73SYNORSWXW4CD2UVCSNHRV4E7AEJHXPMYPNZ4XWX4HDVNYU22CMVWSUYOMBJHEXFZ4QLNA3QEUFUDZOVZSGGMMENTGGXFUADVDRDMYCCIQLSAXXE6NQTRCLDFS2E54CQERGGKABOERL5TFQV2ML7MW34F7K2RHY6WFI7MQ5V4ZZTJHAC&d=AIAADBGCV7SKOFJVO7VS3WPM5BNGFVDURQR76HMJX4QGSHR7JSXMWPF2V5Q5PQ42HT2GXSGQXE4IKLBE7AHKM6IOGHOTAS3FXNPNYLZPNAFMDNYVLUKBIFGXDIF5Z3ZGTTUMUKYULYTLANP52Y75DCSD6OKVEHIIQZSP7MTQTDIHUR6IZC357W7O&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADJ2Q4WIHKLKJNXIKSFYT2Q3TDZNKVIVBL57QG3XOTFGFJMKGN2X33QTTJJSFYGMBUMUPE7CHZS7SKYGSQGORG2L3KDCMH5WYC4TAXTMM3IW2RFVYV36TQEX7Z4AOS4N6WMWT3HAOKKO3GT7TQH73QFY73RQHBNCMCG6TZP4V63OXQNLYAZLS&d=AIAADUD6EMJZDAHXCKOZ5GYEMU54DJFZ3MWMHEEMA5J3Y6KZ2WXRX4G75NAUGTD4SBV6DJSQRZ2H4WTB7KXAG272URKU3P6DLC2L7M44KP5LYU35KUYKXS63P5ZQY2O2YLPLDUL556JQOXAAWJUT7MBRS67QOGP22Q23KURL6Q3KXFTQSBDUW5QI&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
        <!-- @Subject: Prosecutors seek to ask Trump about civil fraud, E. Jean Carroll cases and more if he testifies in… -->
           <tr><td><table style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1)" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACFNYX74ZCOBFBOSPPJBVQ4NEXSDVTB44JBHU7LRGWOTVHL6XTZNURY2QVOFSEK3YA7U4INV3ZH57QVKMLWWLEUYQJTCXC7WGQ2S237SSWJMAER3CH6UFU3WHNFNEBM7BXWPS23LNZNTINYC5YRXJY3EGHYSBQEC2ILZLSIR2RZS36YIDDDML&" id="LrgCardImage1|BB1lOsud" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="350" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.73e0e6cc7b7b638907d5654fb85a4f24&pid=Wdp&w=600&h=350&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="600"></a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:20px 20px 8px 20px;font-size:28px;line-height:1.2;color:#333;font-weight:400;text-decoration:none"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACPKRYCIPZJUTI4AX7LPW3MJ4VSEX4RCTOBNFBYSJJTTRAXVCCGVZIXUJ2POKAN6MZ7FYDKPGX7AQXBMRVQ362RMPGQGSMUGRH3LD4SJPBD3HEMAZVDQKFBEUMMFFS43XVKCW76LV4KSWIMUTMDMG34X7NOOTH6ODDSUJDOXDIAHIBKVXNIED&" id="LrgCardTitle1|BB1lOsud" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">Prosecutors seek to ask Trump about civil fraud, E. Jean Carroll cases and more if he testifies in hush money case</a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:0 20px 11px 20px;font-size:18px;color:#333;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.3"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD4QLEY6BLQHZJT7ISFKLIGQ6Y6RCFBULC2RCQKZNDN32LYB2X267DC3XQSNBQU6IZY66FK5L7LH5KYED7PD7WHRKEJVLH3EWAB63IKGVCFBU4N5KDCOHGYACIXROIWZV5LE7KNOZVQXYMJMKFIWKUXIMHTX7XHQNVM5XWDBJ5CUFDQWGXPJJHXHKROPQG5GMO5FIXVI74EQ2J4&" id="LrgCardSummary1|BB1lOsud" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorney's office said in a court filing Wednesday that they plan to ask Donald Trump…</a></td></tr><tr><td height="25"><table style="margin:0 20px 15px 37px"><tr><td style="padding-right:12px;padding-top:5px" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACDZFKTUAAE2ARBYNY2LW32WXTPX7ENHQ6L5LME66J4IANR7MPZ2VZ2VZHV6YTPZDKNCHGC7EFKKJETGQJZRO4NO5T5AMIQ3Y6XZTQVWZO7CAI2OHBRTH77NZRZGPH5J2AATEIKRFTECF4ALLABS7FRDLHG7JO7MWFDFQDRTKKTFDZ55T6NTTVRSCIXFSCCVLEVE5DR5O2IETSY&" id="LrgCardProviderLogo1|BB1lOsud" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="28" src="https://img-s-msn-com.akamaized.net/tenant/amp/entityid/AA1lLvot.img?w=28&h=28&m=6&q=60&u=t&o=t&l=f&f=jpg" style="border:none" alt=""></a></td><td style="font-size:18px;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.2;border:none;color:#666" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD43UQQ26SB2T73XGBD6WSBABN5UHKLJDPIP5WZJ4EQZCE6A3TZFEXNIF7V2RRSM6SZY4QC5NFWGVDKBXM56WRQHENYN7N32JJBMK2ZETF375RSIYXHTJDKWLALOL5HWGBUL22BMJAK57EIXHQEO5JDFFGHQVAKDYKBFSP5BSGAKEW3UD5H3CARQOBTPRPTYHKWJ2BEY2ZBPOZY&" id="LrgCardProviderNamePos1|BB1lOsud" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">NBC News</a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td></tr>
